about.title: About GolfSimGeek
about.description: {siteName} is your go-to resource for golf simulator reviews, comparisons, setup guides, and the largest directory of mobile golf simulator rental businesses in the US.

advertise.title: Advertise
advertise.description: Promote your golf simulator business or product on {siteName} and reach thousands of golf enthusiasts looking for simulators.

cta.title: Need a custom partnership?
cta.description: Tell us more about your company and we will get back to you as soon as possible.

success.title: Thank you for your payment!
success.description: Please complete your advertisement setup by providing your company details.

login.title: Sign In
login.description: Get access to your dashboard and manage your listings.

verify.title: Check your inbox
verify.description: Check your inbox to sign in to {siteName}.
verify.instructions: We've sent you a magic link to {email}. Please click the link to confirm your address and sign in.
verify.no_email: No email in your inbox? Check your spam folder or <link>try a different email address</link>.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Manage your account and listings on {siteName}.

tools.empty_state: No listings found. Submit or claim a listing to get started.

bookmarks.empty_state: No bookmarked listings yet. Browse and bookmark them to save for later.

blog.title: Blog
blog.description: Golf simulator reviews, setup guides, cost breakdowns, and industry news. Everything you need to find the right simulator for your home, event, or business.

categories.title: Browse Categories
categories.description: Browse all categories to find the right golf simulator products, rentals, and resources.

category.title: {name}
category.description: A curated collection of the best {name}

tags.title: Browse Tags
tags.description: Browse all tags to discover golf simulators by brand, feature, or use case.

tag.title: Tagged "{name}"
tag.description: Explore golf simulators and services tagged with {name}.

error.title: Something went wrong!
error.description: Please try again. If the problem persists, <link>contact support</link>.

not_found.title: That Hole Doesn't Exist
not_found.description: Looks like you found a page that's out of bounds. The listing may have moved or been removed — head back to find golf simulators near you.

submit.title: Add a free listing
submit.description: List your golf simulator business or product on {siteName} for free. We review every submission to maintain quality.

upgrade.title: Upgrade {name}'s Listing
upgrade.description: Upgrade {name}'s listing on {siteName} for more exposure, premium placement, and priority visibility.

success.title: Thank you for submitting {name}!
success.description: We'll review {name}'s submission and publish it on {siteName} soon.
